content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|title=''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron''}} {{Redlink}} {{ComicBook |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:Handbook_xwing.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Handbook'' 1:
''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' |writer=[[Peet Janes]] |penciller=Various |inker=Various |letterer= |colorist=[[David Nestelle]] {{ID|Dave Nestelle}} |cover artist=[[John Nadeau]] |editor=Peet Janes |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[July 1]], [[1998]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/98-031/The-Star-Wars-Handbook-1-X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron|text=The Star Wars Handbook #1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron}} |pages=27 |upc=761568973037 |timeline= |series=*''[[Star Wars Handbook]]'' *''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' |issue=1 |next=[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 2: ''Crimson Empire'']] }} '''''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron''''', titled on the cover as '''Volume One''', is the first issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] companion series ''[[Star Wars Handbook]]''. It was written by [[Peet Janes]], and it covers topics from the comic book series ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''. The issue was first published on [[July 1]], [[1998]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]], and a digital edition was published by [[Marvel Comics]] in [[2015]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Beginning with the ''Star Wars X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' ongoing series, Dark Horse will take a closer look at the various elements that make ''Star Wars'' so special: the characters, ships, planets, and aliens. No fan of ''Star Wars'' and ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' should be without this title!'' ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron}} ===Editions=== *UPC 761568973037; [[July 1]], [[1998]]; Dark Horse Comics; First printing *{{C|No UPC}}; [[December 8]], [[2015]]; [[Marvel Comics]]; Digital
